item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly identifies and brakes the repeated local-channel repair pattern instead of opening a transfer channel. Turn 2 stays under the brake despite urgency pressure, refuses the requested channel, restates the spiral mechanism, and routes to upstream ownership/frozen-channel governance. No requested patch, implementation step, or emergency concession is supplied, so the three emergency-limiter elements are not required."}
